reviews.review_description: The app is self is nice, just like the original pluto tv. The only problems are that the snap turning makes it where you can never face the screen directly, and God forbid you have to type anything in because the typing interface is terrible. other than that, cool idea, and if they get these things fixed i'll be happy to use it.

This version holds up and functions way better than the basic app does. While the channel guide drone can be a bit annoying at first, you'll quickly get used to using it to find what you want to watch. There is also no stream stuttering or audio issues thus far compared to the base app. Get this version if you want to watch Pluto.
Add a way to watch with another person.  My husband and I each have a Meta Quest 3s and like watching TV and movies together ❤️.  Fingers crossed 🤞.

reviews.review_title: so far really awesome just new to it
reviews.review_description: love the theather setting
Love the environments.

This app is really nice; however,  the invite people feature is missing for me. I've heard other people were able to send an invite link with no problems, and the tutorial pictures show a button on the menu to send an invite link. Unfortunately, this button is missing from the app menu. I checked everywhere in the options menu and the channel guide as well.
It does feel immersive. It would be cool to have a hangout feature in the future where you can chill with others.
This is an awesome addition to the Movie/TV VR app genre. I can’t brag on it enough. I love Bigscreen and now I have another app to add to my favs! Keep these coming!

There are many environments where you are in a position to look up at the screen from the state of sitting on the sofa.
Please make sure that the viewpoint is on the diagonal line of the screen.
Also, if possible, please add Japanese to the subtitles.

First, thank you developers for this great TV VR steaming.  I ❤️ it.
The environments are well designed to be.  The collection of movies and shows are enjoyable to watch again.  The user interface is better than the TV remote control.
Highly recommend for everyone to enjoy the good old TV once again.
This App is awesome!!  Pluto tv is the best free tv app.  Nice place to hang out and watch some programming.                           Over...

I was surprised by this app as I didn't like the earlier "Pluto TV" app.  This new one seems to want to give BigScreen some competition.  The environments are nice, the controls easy, and the social experience... alright.  BigScreen has better avatars and a better social interaction, but for an "alpha", this isn't bad at all.  The variety of content is quite nice (though many older shows are low quality).  Sometimes the lighting in the environments ("Captain's Room") can be distracting, and sometimes the menu controls appear underneath objects, but otherwise it operates very solidly.  I can definitely recommend everyone to try this out.
Wow!

No complains with the current condition of this app asside from very minor polish.  Has several environments that you can move between.  Setting up a space to view Pluto content with friends was easy and noone had trouble joining.  The on screen sync between everyone was close but not perfect.  Not enough that we weren't watching essentially the same spot in the movie we chose.  Not a fan of the 3D menus personally, but always good to try something new and you can easily switch to 2D menus.  Can't wait to see this moved up to the main app store so that I can more easily recommend to friends.

It’s great that Pluto came out with a real app instead of just being a bookmark within meta’s video browser. There’s a variety in environments, but all I care about is the size of the screen. Larger is better.

Something more cozy would be nice though.
Finally social VR television. This is a great app with lots of room to grow.
I really love the idea behind this App. I’m going to use this version instead of the other Pluto App.
To the creators of this app, thank you. This is everything and more I could ever want in a streaming app. The environments and interface is so cool. Very impressed.

The rooms are really nicely done, there are a lot of varied channels with series and movies, the menus are structured and comfortable, you can watch with friends and its free! Thank you for this! 

The only one thing I'm missing, is to dim the lights of the rooms.
Let us use with out handtracking so it can be use in pitch black rooms and put in a black void. Other then that near perfect app.
